name: EZPAWN
description_short: EZPAWN is a national pawn shop chain offering collateral-based cash loans, gold/jewelry buying, firearms loans, and pre-owned brand-name merchandise at 25–70% off retail.
description_long:
EZPAWN is a large national pawn shop chain with locations across the United States, including this store at 1501 E. Charleston Blvd. in Las Vegas, NV. As part of a corporate chain rather than an independent shop, EZPAWN operates with standardized processes, branded loyalty programs, and a consumer-facing online presence including an e-commerce shop and digital tools not typically found at independent pawnbrokers.

The Las Vegas Charleston location offers a broad range of financial and retail services. On the lending side, customers can bring in items of value — electronics, jewelry, gold, firearms, tools, musical gear, handbags, and sneakers — and receive a collateral-based pawn loan with the option to redeem items later. EZPAWN also outright purchases gold and diamond jewelry at any karat or weight, including broken pieces. Firearms are accepted for loans and outright purchase at this specific location. On the retail side, the store carries thousands of pre-owned brand-name items at 25–70% below new retail prices, with inventory refreshed daily. Flexible purchase options include layaway (10% down, monthly payments) and a Take Today program that partners with third-party financiers for installment terms up to 12 months, subject to credit eligibility.

Several features distinguish EZPAWN from typical independent pawnbrokers. The EZ+ Rewards Program lets customers earn points on pawn, redemption, sale, and purchase transactions, with online account management for pawn extensions and layaway payments. An Instant Quote tool allows customers to get an estimated value for electronics online before visiting the store. The chain also maintains a live online shop with daily new arrivals, enabling remote browsing of in-store inventory. Product Protection Plans and a Jewelry VIP Program (with guaranteed loan amounts and free cleaning) add structured post-purchase and post-pawn value.

Honestly, EZPAWN fills a specific niche: fast, no-credit-check liquidity using personal property as collateral. It is a legitimate option for consumers who need emergency cash and have assets to pledge, or for budget shoppers seeking heavily discounted brand-name goods. However, pawn loan fees and APRs are not disclosed on the website — terms are set in-store and can be expensive. The Take Today installment option depends on third-party credit approval and terms are not published. Consumers should compare total loan cost carefully before committing.
address: 401 S Van Buren St, Enid, OK 73701

company_info.headquarters: 401 S Van Buren St, Enid, OK 73701

pros: Instant Quote tool lets customers estimate electronics value online before visiting the store
EZ+ Rewards Program earns points on pawn, redeem, sell, and purchase transactions with online account management
Firearms accepted for loans and outright purchase at this location — rifles, shotguns, and handguns
Gold and diamond jewelry purchased at any karat or weight, including broken pieces
Layaway available with only 10% down and affordable monthly payments
Online shop with daily new inventory additions enables remote browsing before visiting
Pre-owned brand-name merchandise priced 25–70% below new retail
cons: Pawn loan APRs and fee schedules are not disclosed online — must visit in-store to learn true loan cost
Take Today installment payment options depend on third-party credit eligibility, which is not guaranteed
Firearm appraisal amounts and loan values are at the sole discretion of each individual location
Online payment features not available in Arizona, Oregon, or Pennsylvania, and not all services apply at all locations
No-credit-check pawn loans are typically a high-cost borrowing option compared to credit union or CDFI alternatives
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash who have electronics, jewelry, tools, or firearms to use as collateral
Budget shoppers seeking brand-name electronics, jewelry, or gear at 25–70% below retail
Sellers looking to liquidate gold jewelry, diamonds, or firearms quickly without a formal appraisal process
Shoppers who want layaway or buy-now-pay-later options on secondhand merchandise without a credit card
diagnosis: EZPAWN is best for consumers who need quick no-credit-check cash by pledging valuables, or bargain shoppers who want discounted brand-name goods with flexible layaway. The main caveat is cost transparency: pawn loan fees are only disclosed in-store, and interest rates on short-term pawn loans can be significantly higher than other emergency cash options.
services: Pawn loans — collateral-based cash loans on items of value
Gold and diamond jewelry buying — all karats, any weight, broken gold accepted
Firearms loans and purchases — rifles, shotguns, handguns, collectibles
Pre-owned brand-name retail merchandise at 25–70% off new retail prices
Online shop with daily new inventory
Instant Quote tool — online electronics valuation estimate
Layaway — 10% down with monthly installment payments
Take Today — third-party installment financing up to 12 months
EZ+ Rewards Program — points on pawn, redeem, sell, and purchase transactions
Online pawn extension and layaway payments via EZ+ account
Product Protection Plan for electronics and audio/video equipment
Jewelry VIP Program — guaranteed loan amounts, stone replacement, free cleaning
